title: Shopify Product
description: A product in a Shopify store. Products are the goods and services that merchants sell. They include information such as title, description, price, images, and variants.

id.description: Unique numeric identifier for the product

body_html.description: The description of the product in HTML format

vendor.description: The name of the product vendor

product_type.description: A categorization for the product used for filtering and searching

handle.description: A URL-friendly unique string for the product automatically generated from the title

created_at.description: The date and time when the product was created in ISO 8601 format

updated_at.description: The date and time when the product was last modified in ISO 8601 format

published_at.description: The date and time when the product was published. Null if the product is not published.

template_suffix.description: The suffix of the Liquid template used for the product page

published_scope.description: Whether the product is published to the Point of Sale channel

tags.description: A comma-separated list of searchable keywords associated with the product

admin_graphql_api_id.description: The GraphQL Admin API identifier in the format gid://shopify/Product/{id}

variants.description: The product variants. Each product can have up to 100 variants.

options.description: The custom product options. A product can have up to 3 options.

images.description: The product images. A product can have up to 250 images.

Variant.description: A product variant representing a specific version of a product defined by its option values

product_id.description: The ID of the parent product

title.description: The variant title composed of option values

price.description: The price of the variant as a decimal string

sku.description: Stock keeping unit for tracking inventory

position.description: The position of the variant in the product variant list

inventory_policy.description: Whether to continue selling when out of stock

compare_at_price.description: The original price for comparison or sale display

fulfillment_service.description: The fulfillment service associated with the variant

inventory_management.description: The fulfillment service that tracks inventory for the variant

option1.description: The value of the first product option

option2.description: The value of the second product option

option3.description: The value of the third product option

taxable.description: Whether tax is charged on the variant

barcode.description: The barcode, UPC, or ISBN for the variant

grams.description: The weight of the variant in grams

weight.description: The weight of the variant in the unit specified by weight_unit

inventory_item_id.description: The ID of the corresponding inventory item

image_id.description: The ID of the image associated with the variant

ProductOption.description: A product option such as Size or Color

position.description: The position of the option in the list

values.description: The available values for this option

position.description: The position of the image in the list

variant_ids.description: Variant IDs associated with this image
